tests.name: PhotoSwipe lightbox on PDP
tests.trigger_eval_js: async () => { const PhotoSwipe = window.themePhotoswipe.PhotoSwipe.default; const PhotoSwipeUI = window.themePhotoswipe.PhotoSwipeUI.default; const el = document.querySelector('[data-zoom-wrapper]'); const jsonEl = document.querySelector('[data-product-json]'); if (!el || !jsonEl) throw new Error('missing pswp elements'); const json = JSON.parse(jsonEl.innerHTML); const items = json.media.filter(m => m.media_type === 'image').map(m => ({src: m.src, w: m.width, h: m.height, id: m.id})); if (!items.length) throw new Error('no image media items'); el.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('theme:scroll:lock', {bubbles: true})); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 0)); const gallery = new PhotoSwipe(el, PhotoSwipeUI, items, {index: 0, showHideOpacity: true, showAnimationDuration: 150, hideAnimationDuration: 250, bgOpacity: 1, spacing: 0, allowPanToNext: false, maxSpreadZoom: 3, history: false, loop: true, pinchToClose: false, modal: false, closeOnScroll: false, closeOnVerticalDrag: true}); gallery.init(); }
